description: The city of lights, famous for the Eiffel Tower, world-class cuisine, and stunning art museums.
notes: Visit the Louvre, try croissants at a local boulangerie, walk along the Seine at sunset.

description: Ancient capital of Japan with thousands of classical Buddhist temples, gardens, and geisha districts.
notes: See the bamboo groves in Arashiyama, visit Fushimi Inari shrine at dawn, try matcha everything.

description: The Eternal City, home to the Colosseum, Vatican City, and some of the world's best pasta.
notes: Tossed a coin in the Trevi Fountain! The carbonara at the small trattoria near the Pantheon was unforgettable.

description: Stunning coastal city beneath Table Mountain with incredible beaches, wine regions, and diverse culture.
notes: Hike Table Mountain, visit Boulders Beach for the penguins, explore the Cape Winelands.

description: The city that never sleeps — iconic skyline, world-famous museums, Broadway shows, and endless food.
notes: Central Park in fall was magical. Must do: the High Line, MOMA, and a real NY slice.
